narrative.headline: 2018 Dodge Grand Caravan: electrical system tops owner complaints
narrative.summary: Across 262 owner complaints to NHTSA, the electrical system is the most-reported area at 90 reports (34%), followed by structure at 57 reports (22%). Most complaints did not involve a crash, injury, or fire. No fires were reported in any category. The electrical system has 1 crash and 1 injury, and the structure category has the only reported death in this data, along with 1 crash.

issues.sample: TL* THE CONTACT RENTED A 2018 DODGE GRAND CARAVAN. WHILE THE PASSENGER SIDE SLIDING DOOR WAS BEING CLOSED FROM INSIDE THE VEHICLE, THE CONTACT'S SON'S HAND WAS CRUSHED FROM STOPPING TO CLOSE THE DOOR. THE CONTACT MENTIONED THAT THE DOOR SENSOR FAILED TO DETECT HIS SON BETWEEN THE
issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Most-reported area: 90 complaints (34%), with no fires reported. This category includes 1 crash and 1 injury. One report describes a sliding-door sensor that failed to detect a child, crushing his hand as the door closed.

issues.title: Structure
issues.blurb: 57 complaints (22%), with no fires reported. This is the only category with a reported death (1), and it also includes 1 crash.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: 34 complaints (13%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries reported. One owner describes the van jerking when pulling away from a stop and needing extra room to stop.

issues.sample: ENGINE STALLS WITHOUT WARNING WHEN GAS GAUGE GETS TO 1/4 OF TANK.  IT HAS HAPPENED WHEN GOING 70 MPH ON HIGHWAY, IN STOP AND GO TRAFFIC ON HIGHWAY, GOING SLOW SPEEDS ON A RESIDENTIAL STREET, OR AT A STOP SIGN.  LOOSE POWER STEERING AND POWER BRAKES.  HAVE TO COME TO COMPLETE STOP
issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: 22 complaints (8%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries reported. One owner describes the engine stalling without warning at a range of speeds, with the steering and brakes going loose.

issues.title: Latches/Locks/Linkages
issues.blurb: 14 complaints (5%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries reported. One owner describes the sliding-door lock jamming with the door stuck shut and unable to open from inside or outside.
